    Benedikt Ahrens, Marco Maggesi

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.catiso.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.CategoryEquality.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat. Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Adjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.EquivToAdjequiv.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.AdjointUnique.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.

Local Open Scope cat.


prebicat_data


prebicat_data

  
UU
?ob → ?ob → UU
∏ X Y : ?ob, ?mor X Y → ?mor X Y → UU
∏ X : ?ob, ?mor X X
∏ X Y Z : ?ob, ?mor X Y → ?mor Y Z → ?mor X Z
∏ (X Y : ?ob) (f : ?mor X Y), ?cell X Y f f
∏ (X Y : ?ob) (f g h : ?mor X Y),
?cell X Y f g → ?cell X Y g h → ?cell X Y f h
∏ (X Y Z : ?ob) (f : ?mor X Y) (g h : ?mor Y Z),
?cell Y Z g h
→ ?cell X Z (?comp X Y Z f g) (?comp X Y Z f h)
∏ (X Y Z : ?ob) (g h : ?mor X Y) (f : ?mor Y Z),
?cell X Y g h
→ ?cell X Z (?comp X Y Z g f) (?comp X Y Z h f)
∏ (X Y : ?ob) (f : ?mor X Y),
?cell X Y (?comp X X Y (?id₁ X) f) f
∏ (X Y : ?ob) (f : ?mor X Y),
?cell X Y f (?comp X X Y (?id₁ X) f)
∏ (X Y : ?ob) (f : ?mor X Y),
?cell X Y (?comp X Y Y f (?id₁ Y)) f
∏ (X Y : ?ob) (f : ?mor X Y),
?cell X Y f (?comp X Y Y f (?id₁ Y))
∏ (W X Y Z : ?ob) (f : ?mor W X) (g : ?mor X Y)
(h : ?mor Y Z),
?cell W Z (?comp W X Z f (?comp X Y Z g h))
  (?comp W Y Z (?comp W X Y f g) h)
∏ (W X Y Z : ?ob) (f : ?mor W X) (g : ?mor X Y)
(h : ?mor Y Z),
?cell W Z (?comp W Y Z (?comp W X Y f g) h)
  (?comp W X Z f (?comp X Y Z g h))

  
UU
 exact univalent_category.
  
univalent_category → univalent_category → UU
 exact (λ C D, functor C D).
  
∏ X Y : univalent_category,
(λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X Y
→ (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X Y → UU
 exact (λ _ _ F G, nat_trans F G).
  
∏ X : univalent_category,
(λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X X
 exact (λ C, functor_identity C).
  
∏ X Y Z : univalent_category,
(λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X Y
→ (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) Y Z
  → (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X Z
 exact (λ _ _ _ F G, functor_composite F G).
  
∏ (X Y : univalent_category)
(f : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X Y),
(λ (X0 Y0 : univalent_category)
 (F G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0),
 F ⟹ G) X Y f f
 exact (λ _ _ F, nat_trans_id F).
  
∏ (X Y : univalent_category)
(f g h : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X Y),
(λ (X0 Y0 : univalent_category)
 (F G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0),
 F ⟹ G) X Y f g
→ (λ (X0 Y0 : univalent_category)
   (F G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0),
   F ⟹ G) X Y g h
  → (λ (X0 Y0 : univalent_category)
     (F G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0),
     F ⟹ G) X Y f h
 exact (λ _ _ _ _ _ α β, nat_trans_comp _ _ _ α β).
  
∏ (X Y Z : univalent_category)
(f : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X Y)
(g h : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) Y Z),
(λ (X0 Y0 : univalent_category)
 (F G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0),
 F ⟹ G) Y Z g h
→ (λ (X0 Y0 : univalent_category)
   (F G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0),
   F ⟹ G) X Z
    ((λ (X0 Y0 Z0 : univalent_category)
      (F : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0)
      (G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) Y0 Z0),
      F ∙ G) X Y Z f g)
    ((λ (X0 Y0 Z0 : univalent_category)
      (F : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0)
      (G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) Y0 Z0),
      F ∙ G) X Y Z f h)
 exact (λ _ _ _ F _ _ α, pre_whisker F α).
  
∏ (X Y Z : univalent_category)
(g h : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X Y)
(f : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) Y Z),
(λ (X0 Y0 : univalent_category)
 (F G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0),
 F ⟹ G) X Y g h
→ (λ (X0 Y0 : univalent_category)
   (F G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0),
   F ⟹ G) X Z
    ((λ (X0 Y0 Z0 : univalent_category)
      (F : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0)
      (G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) Y0 Z0),
      F ∙ G) X Y Z g f)
    ((λ (X0 Y0 Z0 : univalent_category)
      (F : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0)
      (G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) Y0 Z0),
      F ∙ G) X Y Z h f)
 exact (λ _ _ _ _ _ H α, post_whisker α H).
  
∏ (X Y : univalent_category)
(f : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X Y),
(λ (X0 Y0 : univalent_category)
 (F G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0),
 F ⟹ G) X Y
  ((λ (X0 Y0 Z : univalent_category)
    (F : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0)
    (G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) Y0 Z),
    F ∙ G) X X Y
     ((λ C : univalent_category, functor_identity C) X)
     f) f
 exact (λ _ _ F, nat_trans_id F).
  
∏ (X Y : univalent_category)
(f : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X Y),
(λ (X0 Y0 : univalent_category)
 (F G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0),
 F ⟹ G) X Y f
  ((λ (X0 Y0 Z : univalent_category)
    (F : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0)
    (G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) Y0 Z),
    F ∙ G) X X Y
     ((λ C : univalent_category, functor_identity C) X)
     f)
 exact (λ _ _ F, nat_trans_id F).
  
∏ (X Y : univalent_category)
(f : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X Y),
(λ (X0 Y0 : univalent_category)
 (F G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0),
 F ⟹ G) X Y
  ((λ (X0 Y0 Z : univalent_category)
    (F : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0)
    (G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) Y0 Z),
    F ∙ G) X Y Y f
     ((λ C : univalent_category, functor_identity C) Y))
  f
 exact (λ _ _ F, nat_trans_id F).
  
∏ (X Y : univalent_category)
(f : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X Y),
(λ (X0 Y0 : univalent_category)
 (F G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0),
 F ⟹ G) X Y f
  ((λ (X0 Y0 Z : univalent_category)
    (F : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0)
    (G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) Y0 Z),
    F ∙ G) X Y Y f
     ((λ C : univalent_category, functor_identity C) Y))
 exact (λ _ _ F, nat_trans_id F).
  
∏ (W X Y Z : univalent_category)
(f : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) W X)
(g : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X Y)
(h : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) Y Z),
(λ (X0 Y0 : univalent_category)
 (F G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0),
 F ⟹ G) W Z
  ((λ (X0 Y0 Z0 : univalent_category)
    (F : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0)
    (G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) Y0 Z0),
    F ∙ G) W X Z f
     ((λ (X0 Y0 Z0 : univalent_category)
       (F : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0)
       (G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) Y0 Z0),
       F ∙ G) X Y Z g h))
  ((λ (X0 Y0 Z0 : univalent_category)
    (F : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0)
    (G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) Y0 Z0),
    F ∙ G) W Y Z
     ((λ (X0 Y0 Z0 : univalent_category)
       (F : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0)
       (G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) Y0 Z0),
       F ∙ G) W X Y f g) h)
 exact (λ _ _ _ _ _ _ _, nat_trans_id _).
  
∏ (W X Y Z : univalent_category)
(f : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) W X)
(g : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X Y)
(h : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) Y Z),
(λ (X0 Y0 : univalent_category)
 (F G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0),
 F ⟹ G) W Z
  ((λ (X0 Y0 Z0 : univalent_category)
    (F : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0)
    (G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) Y0 Z0),
    F ∙ G) W Y Z
     ((λ (X0 Y0 Z0 : univalent_category)
       (F : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0)
       (G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) Y0 Z0),
       F ∙ G) W X Y f g) h)
  ((λ (X0 Y0 Z0 : univalent_category)
    (F : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0)
    (G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) Y0 Z0),
    F ∙ G) W X Z f
     ((λ (X0 Y0 Z0 : univalent_category)
       (F : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) X0 Y0)
       (G : (λ C D : univalent_category, C ⟶ D) Y0 Z0),
       F ∙ G) X Y Z g h))
 exact (λ _ _ _ _ _ _ _, nat_trans_id _).
Defined.


prebicat_laws cat_prebicat_data


prebicat_laws cat_prebicat_data

  
∏ (a b : univalent_category) (f g : a ⟶ b)
(x : f ⟹ g),
nat_trans_comp f f g (nat_trans_id f) x = x
∏ (a b : univalent_category) (f g : a ⟶ b)
(x : f ⟹ g),
nat_trans_comp f g g x (nat_trans_id g) = x
∏ (a b : univalent_category) (f g h k : a ⟶ b)
(x : f ⟹ g) (y : g ⟹ h) (z : h ⟹ k),
nat_trans_comp f g k x (nat_trans_comp g h k y z) =
nat_trans_comp f h k (nat_trans_comp f g h x y) z
∏ (a b c : univalent_category) (f : a ⟶ b)
(g : b ⟶ c),
pre_whisker f (nat_trans_id g) =
nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data f g)
∏ (a b c : univalent_category) (f : a ⟶ b)
(g : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker (nat_trans_id f) g =
nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data f g)
∏ (a b c : univalent_category) (f : a ⟶ b)
(g h i : b ⟶ c) (x : g ⟹ h) (y : h ⟹ i),
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data f g)
  (functor_composite_data f h)
  (functor_composite_data f i) (pre_whisker f x)
  (pre_whisker f y) =
pre_whisker f (nat_trans_comp g h i x y)
∏ (a b c : univalent_category) (f g h : a ⟶ b)
(i : b ⟶ c) (x : f ⟹ g) (y : g ⟹ h),
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data f i)
  (functor_composite_data g i)
  (functor_composite_data h i) (post_whisker x i)
  (post_whisker y i) =
post_whisker (nat_trans_comp f g h x y) i
∏ (a b : univalent_category) (f g : a ⟶ b)
(x : f ⟹ g),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data a) f)
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data a) g)
  g (pre_whisker (functor_identity_data a) x)
  (nat_trans_id g) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data a) f)
  f g (nat_trans_id f) x
∏ (a b : univalent_category) (f g : a ⟶ b)
(x : f ⟹ g),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data f (functor_identity_data b))
  (functor_composite_data g (functor_identity_data b))
  g (post_whisker x (functor_identity b))
  (nat_trans_id g) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data f (functor_identity_data b))
  f g (nat_trans_id f) x
∏ (a b c d : univalent_category) (f : a ⟶ b)
(g : b ⟶ c) (h i : c ⟶ d) (x : h ⟹ i),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data g h))
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data g i))
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data f g)
     i) (pre_whisker f (pre_whisker g x))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data f
        (functor_composite_data g i))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data g h))
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data f g)
     h)
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data f g)
     i)
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data f
        (functor_composite_data g h)))
  (pre_whisker (functor_composite_data f g) x)
∏ (a b c d : univalent_category) (f : a ⟶ b)
(g h : b ⟶ c) (i : c ⟶ d) (x : g ⟹ h),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data g i))
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data h i))
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data f h)
     i) (pre_whisker f (post_whisker x i))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data f
        (functor_composite_data h i))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data g i))
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data f g)
     i)
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data f h)
     i)
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data f
        (functor_composite_data g i)))
  (post_whisker (pre_whisker f x) i)
∏ (a b c d : univalent_category) (f g : a ⟶ b)
(h : b ⟶ c) (i : c ⟶ d) (x : f ⟹ g),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data h i))
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data f h)
     i)
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data g h)
     i)
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data f
        (functor_composite_data h i)))
  (post_whisker (post_whisker x h) i) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data h i))
  (functor_composite_data g
     (functor_composite_data h i))
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data g h)
     i) (post_whisker x (h ∙ i))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data g
        (functor_composite_data h i)))
∏ (a b c : univalent_category) (f g : a ⟶ b)
(h i : b ⟶ c) (x : f ⟹ g) (y : h ⟹ i),
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data f h)
  (functor_composite_data g h)
  (functor_composite_data g i) (post_whisker x h)
  (pre_whisker g y) =
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data f h)
  (functor_composite_data f i)
  (functor_composite_data g i) (pre_whisker f y)
  (post_whisker x i)
∏ (a b : univalent_category) (f : a ⟶ b),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data a) f)
  f
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data a) f)
  (nat_trans_id f) (nat_trans_id f) =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data a) f)
∏ (a b : univalent_category) (f : a ⟶ b),
nat_trans_comp f
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data a) f)
  f (nat_trans_id f) (nat_trans_id f) = nat_trans_id f
∏ (a b : univalent_category) (f : a ⟶ b),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data f (functor_identity_data b))
  f
  (functor_composite_data f (functor_identity_data b))
  (nat_trans_id f) (nat_trans_id f) =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data f (functor_identity_data b))
∏ (a b : univalent_category) (f : a ⟶ b),
nat_trans_comp f
  (functor_composite_data f (functor_identity_data b))
  f (nat_trans_id f) (nat_trans_id f) = nat_trans_id f
∏ (a b c d : univalent_category) (f : a ⟶ b)
(g : b ⟶ c) (h : c ⟶ d),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data g h))
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data f g)
     h)
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data g h))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data f
        (functor_composite_data g h)))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data f g) h)) =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data g h))
∏ (a b c d : univalent_category) (f : a ⟶ b)
(g : b ⟶ c) (h : c ⟶ d),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data f g)
     h)
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data g h))
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data f g)
     h)
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data f g) h))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data f
        (functor_composite_data g h))) =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data f g)
     h)
∏ (a b c : univalent_category) (f : a ⟶ b)
(g : b ⟶ c),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data b)
        g))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data f
        (functor_identity_data b)) g)
  (functor_composite_data f g)
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data f
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_identity_data b) g)))
  (post_whisker (nat_trans_id f) g) =
pre_whisker f (nat_trans_id g)
∏ (a b c d e : univalent_category) (f : a ⟶ b)
(g : b ⟶ c) (h : c ⟶ d) (i : d ⟶ e),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data g
        (functor_composite_data h i)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data f
        (functor_composite_data g h)) i)
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data f g) h) i)
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data f
        (functor_composite_data g
           (functor_composite_data h i)))
     (functor_composite_data f
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data g h) i))
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data f
           (functor_composite_data g h)) i)
     (pre_whisker f
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data g
              (functor_composite_data h i))))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data f
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data g h) i))))
  (post_whisker
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data f
           (functor_composite_data g h))) i) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data g
        (functor_composite_data h i)))
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data f g)
     (functor_composite_data h i))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data f g) h) i)
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data f
        (functor_composite_data g
           (functor_composite_data h i))))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data f g)
        (functor_composite_data h i)))

  
∏ (a b : univalent_category) (f g : a ⟶ b)
(x : f ⟹ g),
nat_trans_comp f f g (nat_trans_id f) x = x
 
C, D: univalent_category
F, G: C ⟶ D
η: F ⟹ G
nat_trans_comp F F G (nat_trans_id F) η = η

    
C, D: univalent_category
F, G: C ⟶ D
η: F ⟹ G
∏ x : C,
nat_trans_comp F F G (nat_trans_id F) η x = η x

    
C, D: univalent_category
F, G: C ⟶ D
η: F ⟹ G
x: C
id₁ (F x) · η x = η x

    apply id_left.
  
∏ (a b : univalent_category) (f g : a ⟶ b)
(x : f ⟹ g),
nat_trans_comp f g g x (nat_trans_id g) = x
 
C, D: univalent_category
F, G: C ⟶ D
η: F ⟹ G
nat_trans_comp F G G η (nat_trans_id G) = η

    
C, D: univalent_category
F, G: C ⟶ D
η: F ⟹ G
∏ x : C,
nat_trans_comp F G G η (nat_trans_id G) x = η x

    
C, D: univalent_category
F, G: C ⟶ D
η: F ⟹ G
x: C
η x · id₁ (G x) = η x

    apply id_right.
  
∏ (a b : univalent_category) (f g h k : a ⟶ b)
(x : f ⟹ g) (y : g ⟹ h) (z : h ⟹ k),
nat_trans_comp f g k x (nat_trans_comp g h k y z) =
nat_trans_comp f h k (nat_trans_comp f g h x y) z
 
C, D: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: C ⟶ D
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
γ: F₃ ⟹ F₄
nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₄ α
  (nat_trans_comp F₂ F₃ F₄ β γ) =
nat_trans_comp F₁ F₃ F₄ (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β)
  γ

    
C, D: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: C ⟶ D
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
γ: F₃ ⟹ F₄
∏ x : C,
nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₄ α
  (nat_trans_comp F₂ F₃ F₄ β γ) x =
nat_trans_comp F₁ F₃ F₄ (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β)
  γ x

    
C, D: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: C ⟶ D
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
γ: F₃ ⟹ F₄
x: C
α x · (β x · γ x) = α x · β x · γ x

    apply assoc.
  
∏ (a b c : univalent_category) (f : a ⟶ b)
(g : b ⟶ c),
pre_whisker f (nat_trans_id g) =
nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data f g)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
pre_whisker F (nat_trans_id G) =
nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data F G)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
∏ x : C₁,
pre_whisker F (nat_trans_id G) x =
nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data F G) x

    intro; apply idpath.
  
∏ (a b c : univalent_category) (f : a ⟶ b)
(g : b ⟶ c),
post_whisker (nat_trans_id f) g =
nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data f g)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
post_whisker (nat_trans_id F) G =
nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data F G)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
∏ x : C₁,
post_whisker (nat_trans_id F) G x =
nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data F G) x

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
x: C₁
# (pr1 G) (id₁ (F x)) = id₁ (G (F x))

    apply functor_id.
  
∏ (a b c : univalent_category) (f : a ⟶ b)
(g h i : b ⟶ c) (x : g ⟹ h) (y : h ⟹ i),
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data f g)
  (functor_composite_data f h)
  (functor_composite_data f i) (pre_whisker f x)
  (pre_whisker f y) =
pre_whisker f (nat_trans_comp g h i x y)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: G₁ ⟹ G₂
β: G₂ ⟹ G₃
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data F G₁)
  (functor_composite_data F G₂)
  (functor_composite_data F G₃) (pre_whisker F α)
  (pre_whisker F β) =
pre_whisker F (nat_trans_comp G₁ G₂ G₃ α β)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂, G₃: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: G₁ ⟹ G₂
β: G₂ ⟹ G₃
∏ x : C₁,
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data F G₁)
  (functor_composite_data F G₂)
  (functor_composite_data F G₃) (pre_whisker F α)
  (pre_whisker F β) x =
pre_whisker F (nat_trans_comp G₁ G₂ G₃ α β) x

    intros; apply idpath.
  
∏ (a b c : univalent_category) (f g h : a ⟶ b)
(i : b ⟶ c) (x : f ⟹ g) (y : g ⟹ h),
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data f i)
  (functor_composite_data g i)
  (functor_composite_data h i) (post_whisker x i)
  (post_whisker y i) =
post_whisker (nat_trans_comp f g h x y) i
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data F₁ G)
  (functor_composite_data F₂ G)
  (functor_composite_data F₃ G) (post_whisker α G)
  (post_whisker β G) =
post_whisker (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) G

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
∏ x : C₁,
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data F₁ G)
  (functor_composite_data F₂ G)
  (functor_composite_data F₃ G) (post_whisker α G)
  (post_whisker β G) x =
post_whisker (nat_trans_comp F₁ F₂ F₃ α β) G x

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: F₂ ⟹ F₃
x: C₁
# (pr1 G) (pr1 α x) · # (pr1 G) (pr1 β x) =
# (pr1 G) (α x · β x)

    exact (!(functor_comp G _ _)).
  
∏ (a b : univalent_category) (f g : a ⟶ b)
(x : f ⟹ g),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data a) f)
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data a) g)
  g (pre_whisker (functor_identity_data a) x)
  (nat_trans_id g) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data a) f)
  f g (nat_trans_id f) x
 
C, D: univalent_category
F, G: C ⟶ D
α: F ⟹ G
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data C) F)
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data C) G)
  G (pre_whisker (functor_identity_data C) α)
  (nat_trans_id G) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data C) F)
  F G (nat_trans_id F) α

    
C, D: univalent_category
F, G: C ⟶ D
α: F ⟹ G
∏ x : C,
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data C) F)
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data C) G)
  G (pre_whisker (functor_identity_data C) α)
  (nat_trans_id G) x =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data C) F)
  F G (nat_trans_id F) α x

    
C, D: univalent_category
F, G: C ⟶ D
α: F ⟹ G
x: C
pr1 α x · id₁ (G x) = id₁ (F x) · α x

    
C, D: univalent_category
F, G: C ⟶ D
α: F ⟹ G
x: C
pr1 α x = α x

    apply idpath.
  
∏ (a b : univalent_category) (f g : a ⟶ b)
(x : f ⟹ g),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data f (functor_identity_data b))
  (functor_composite_data g (functor_identity_data b))
  g (post_whisker x (functor_identity b))
  (nat_trans_id g) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data f (functor_identity_data b))
  f g (nat_trans_id f) x
 
C, D: univalent_category
F, G: C ⟶ D
α: F ⟹ G
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data F (functor_identity_data D))
  (functor_composite_data G (functor_identity_data D))
  G (post_whisker α (functor_identity D))
  (nat_trans_id G) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data F (functor_identity_data D))
  F G (nat_trans_id F) α

    
C, D: univalent_category
F, G: C ⟶ D
α: F ⟹ G
∏ x : C,
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data F (functor_identity_data D))
  (functor_composite_data G (functor_identity_data D))
  G (post_whisker α (functor_identity D))
  (nat_trans_id G) x =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data F (functor_identity_data D))
  F G (nat_trans_id F) α x

    
C, D: univalent_category
F, G: C ⟶ D
α: F ⟹ G
x: C
pr1 α x · id₁ (G x) = id₁ (F x) · α x

    
C, D: univalent_category
F, G: C ⟶ D
α: F ⟹ G
x: C
pr1 α x = α x

    apply idpath.
  
∏ (a b c d : univalent_category) (f : a ⟶ b)
(g : b ⟶ c) (h i : c ⟶ d) (x : h ⟹ i),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data g h))
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data g i))
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data f g)
     i) (pre_whisker f (pre_whisker g x))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data f
        (functor_composite_data g i))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data g h))
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data f g)
     h)
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data f g)
     i)
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data f
        (functor_composite_data g h)))
  (pre_whisker (functor_composite_data f g) x)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H₁, H₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
α: H₁ ⟹ H₂
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data F
     (functor_composite_data G H₁))
  (functor_composite_data F
     (functor_composite_data G H₂))
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data F G)
     H₂) (pre_whisker F (pre_whisker G α))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data F
        (functor_composite_data G H₂))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data F
     (functor_composite_data G H₁))
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data F G)
     H₁)
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data F G)
     H₂)
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data F
        (functor_composite_data G H₁)))
  (pre_whisker (functor_composite_data F G) α)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H₁, H₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
α: H₁ ⟹ H₂
∏ x : C₁,
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data F
     (functor_composite_data G H₁))
  (functor_composite_data F
     (functor_composite_data G H₂))
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data F G)
     H₂) (pre_whisker F (pre_whisker G α))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data F
        (functor_composite_data G H₂))) x =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data F
     (functor_composite_data G H₁))
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data F G)
     H₁)
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data F G)
     H₂)
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data F
        (functor_composite_data G H₁)))
  (pre_whisker (functor_composite_data F G) α) x

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H₁, H₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
α: H₁ ⟹ H₂
x: C₁
pr1 α (pr1 G (pr1 F x)) · id₁ (H₂ (G (F x))) =
id₁ (H₁ (G (F x))) · pr1 α (G (F x))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H₁, H₂: C₃ ⟶ C₄
α: H₁ ⟹ H₂
x: C₁
pr1 α (pr1 G (pr1 F x)) = pr1 α (G (F x))

    apply idpath.
  
∏ (a b c d : univalent_category) (f : a ⟶ b)
(g h : b ⟶ c) (i : c ⟶ d) (x : g ⟹ h),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data g i))
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data h i))
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data f h)
     i) (pre_whisker f (post_whisker x i))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data f
        (functor_composite_data h i))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data g i))
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data f g)
     i)
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data f h)
     i)
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data f
        (functor_composite_data g i)))
  (post_whisker (pre_whisker f x) i)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
α: G₁ ⟹ G₂
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data F
     (functor_composite_data G₁ H))
  (functor_composite_data F
     (functor_composite_data G₂ H))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data F G₂) H)
  (pre_whisker F (post_whisker α H))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data F
        (functor_composite_data G₂ H))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data F
     (functor_composite_data G₁ H))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data F G₁) H)
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data F G₂) H)
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data F
        (functor_composite_data G₁ H)))
  (post_whisker (pre_whisker F α) H)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
α: G₁ ⟹ G₂
∏ x : C₁,
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data F
     (functor_composite_data G₁ H))
  (functor_composite_data F
     (functor_composite_data G₂ H))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data F G₂) H)
  (pre_whisker F (post_whisker α H))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data F
        (functor_composite_data G₂ H))) x =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data F
     (functor_composite_data G₁ H))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data F G₁) H)
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data F G₂) H)
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data F
        (functor_composite_data G₁ H)))
  (post_whisker (pre_whisker F α) H) x

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
α: G₁ ⟹ G₂
x: C₁
# (pr1 H) (pr1 α (pr1 F x)) · id₁ (H (G₂ (F x))) =
id₁ (H (G₁ (F x))) · # (pr1 H) (pr1 α (pr1 F x))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, G₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
α: G₁ ⟹ G₂
x: C₁
# (pr1 H) (pr1 α (pr1 F x)) =
# (pr1 H) (pr1 α (pr1 F x))

    apply idpath.
  
∏ (a b c d : univalent_category) (f g : a ⟶ b)
(h : b ⟶ c) (i : c ⟶ d) (x : f ⟹ g),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data h i))
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data f h)
     i)
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data g h)
     i)
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data f
        (functor_composite_data h i)))
  (post_whisker (post_whisker x h) i) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data h i))
  (functor_composite_data g
     (functor_composite_data h i))
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data g h)
     i) (post_whisker x (h ∙ i))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data g
        (functor_composite_data h i)))
 
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data F₁
     (functor_composite_data G H))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data F₁ G) H)
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data F₂ G) H)
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data F₁
        (functor_composite_data G H)))
  (post_whisker (post_whisker α G) H) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data F₁
     (functor_composite_data G H))
  (functor_composite_data F₂
     (functor_composite_data G H))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data F₂ G) H)
  (post_whisker α (G ∙ H))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data F₂
        (functor_composite_data G H)))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
∏ x : C₁,
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data F₁
     (functor_composite_data G H))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data F₁ G) H)
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data F₂ G) H)
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data F₁
        (functor_composite_data G H)))
  (post_whisker (post_whisker α G) H) x =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data F₁
     (functor_composite_data G H))
  (functor_composite_data F₂
     (functor_composite_data G H))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data F₂ G) H)
  (post_whisker α (G ∙ H))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data F₂
        (functor_composite_data G H))) x

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
x: C₁
id₁ (H (G (F₁ x))) · # (pr1 H) (# (pr1 G) (pr1 α x)) =
# H (# G (pr1 α x)) · id₁ (H (G (F₂ x)))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
x: C₁
# (pr1 H) (# (pr1 G) (pr1 α x)) = # H (# G (pr1 α x))

    apply idpath.
  
∏ (a b c : univalent_category) (f g : a ⟶ b)
(h i : b ⟶ c) (x : f ⟹ g) (y : h ⟹ i),
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data f h)
  (functor_composite_data g h)
  (functor_composite_data g i) (post_whisker x h)
  (pre_whisker g y) =
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data f h)
  (functor_composite_data f i)
  (functor_composite_data g i) (pre_whisker f y)
  (post_whisker x i)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, H₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: G₁ ⟹ H₂
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data F₁ G₁)
  (functor_composite_data F₂ G₁)
  (functor_composite_data F₂ H₂) (post_whisker α G₁)
  (pre_whisker F₂ β) =
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data F₁ G₁)
  (functor_composite_data F₁ H₂)
  (functor_composite_data F₂ H₂) (pre_whisker F₁ β)
  (post_whisker α H₂)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, H₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: G₁ ⟹ H₂
∏ x : C₁,
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data F₁ G₁)
  (functor_composite_data F₂ G₁)
  (functor_composite_data F₂ H₂) (post_whisker α G₁)
  (pre_whisker F₂ β) x =
nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data F₁ G₁)
  (functor_composite_data F₁ H₂)
  (functor_composite_data F₂ H₂) (pre_whisker F₁ β)
  (post_whisker α H₂) x

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F₁, F₂: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G₁, H₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
α: F₁ ⟹ F₂
β: G₁ ⟹ H₂
x: C₁
# (pr1 G₁) (pr1 α x) · pr1 β (pr1 F₂ x) =
pr1 β (pr1 F₁ x) · # (pr1 H₂) (pr1 α x)

    exact ((nat_trans_ax β _ _ _)).
  
∏ (a b : univalent_category) (f : a ⟶ b),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data a) f)
  f
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data a) f)
  (nat_trans_id f) (nat_trans_id f) =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data a) f)
 
C, D: univalent_category
F: C ⟶ D
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data C) F)
  F
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data C) F)
  (nat_trans_id F) (nat_trans_id F) =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data C) F)

    
C, D: univalent_category
F: C ⟶ D
∏ x : C,
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data C) F)
  F
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data C) F)
  (nat_trans_id F) (nat_trans_id F) x =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data C) F)
  x

    
C, D: univalent_category
F: C ⟶ D
x: C
id₁ (F x) · id₁ (F x) = id₁ (F x)

    apply id_left.
  
∏ (a b : univalent_category) (f : a ⟶ b),
nat_trans_comp f
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data a) f)
  f (nat_trans_id f) (nat_trans_id f) = nat_trans_id f

F: C ⟶ D
nat_trans_comp F
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data C) F)
  F (nat_trans_id F) (nat_trans_id F) = nat_trans_id F

F: C ⟶ D
∏ x : C,
nat_trans_comp F
  (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data C) F)
  F (nat_trans_id F) (nat_trans_id F) x =
nat_trans_id F x

F: C ⟶ D
x: C
id₁ (F x) · id₁ (F x) = id₁ (F x)

    apply id_left.

nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data f (functor_identity_data b))
  f
  (functor_composite_data f (functor_identity_data b))
  (nat_trans_id f) (nat_trans_id f) =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data f (functor_identity_data b))

nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data F (functor_identity_data D))
  F

  (nat_trans_id F) (nat_trans_id F) =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data F (functor_identity_data D))

  (nat_trans_id F) (nat_trans_id F) x =

x: C
id₁ (F x) · id₁ (F x) = id₁ (F x)

    apply id_left.

nat_trans_comp f

  f (nat_trans_id f) (nat_trans_id f) = nat_trans_id f

nat_trans_comp F
  (functor_composite_data F (functor_identity_data D))
  F (nat_trans_id F) (nat_trans_id F) = nat_trans_id F

F: C ⟶ D
x: C
id₁ (F x) · id₁ (F x) = id₁ (F x)

    apply id_left.
  
∏ (a b c d : univalent_category) (f : a ⟶ b)
(g : b ⟶ c) (h : c ⟶ d),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data g h))
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data f g)
     h)
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data g h))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data f
        (functor_composite_data g h)))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data f g) h)) =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data g h))
 
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
F₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data F₁
     (functor_composite_data F₂ F₃))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data F₁ F₂) F₃)
  (functor_composite_data F₁
     (functor_composite_data F₂ F₃))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data F₁
        (functor_composite_data F₂ F₃)))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data F₁ F₂) F₃)) =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data F₁
     (functor_composite_data F₂ F₃))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
F₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
∏ x : C₁,
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data F₁
     (functor_composite_data F₂ F₃))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data F₁ F₂) F₃)
  (functor_composite_data F₁
     (functor_composite_data F₂ F₃))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data F₁
        (functor_composite_data F₂ F₃)))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data F₁ F₂) F₃)) x =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data F₁
     (functor_composite_data F₂ F₃)) x

F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
F₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
x: C₁
id₁ (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))) · id₁ (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))) =
id₁ (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x)))

    apply id_left.
  
∏ (a b c d : univalent_category) (f : a ⟶ b)
(g : b ⟶ c) (h : c ⟶ d),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data f g)
     h)
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data g h))
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data f g)
     h)
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data f g) h))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data f
        (functor_composite_data g h))) =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data f g)
     h)

F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
F₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data F₁ F₂) F₃)
  (functor_composite_data F₁
     (functor_composite_data F₂ F₃))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data F₁ F₂) F₃)
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data F₁ F₂) F₃))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data F₁
        (functor_composite_data F₂ F₃))) =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data F₁ F₂) F₃)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
F₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
∏ x : C₁,
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data F₁ F₂) F₃)
  (functor_composite_data F₁
     (functor_composite_data F₂ F₃))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data F₁ F₂) F₃)
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data F₁ F₂) F₃))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data F₁
        (functor_composite_data F₂ F₃))) x =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data F₁ F₂) F₃) x

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
F₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
x: C₁
id₁ (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))) · id₁ (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))) =
id₁ (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x)))

    apply id_left.
  
∏ (a b c : univalent_category) (f : a ⟶ b)
(g : b ⟶ c),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data (functor_identity_data b)
        g))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data f
        (functor_identity_data b)) g)
  (functor_composite_data f g)
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data f
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_identity_data b) g)))
  (post_whisker (nat_trans_id f) g) =
pre_whisker f (nat_trans_id g)
 
C₁, C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data F
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_identity_data C₂) G))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data F
        (functor_identity_data C₂)) G)
  (functor_composite_data F G)
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data F
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_identity_data C₂) G)))
  (post_whisker (nat_trans_id F) G) =
pre_whisker F (nat_trans_id G)

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
∏ x : C₁,
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data F
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_identity_data C₂) G))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data F
        (functor_identity_data C₂)) G)
  (functor_composite_data F G)
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data F
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_identity_data C₂) G)))
  (post_whisker (nat_trans_id F) G) x =
pre_whisker F (nat_trans_id G) x

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
x: C₁
id₁ (G (F x)) · # (pr1 G) (id₁ (F x)) =
id₁ (G (pr1 F x))

    exact (id_left _ @ functor_id G _).
  
∏ (a b c d e : univalent_category) (f : a ⟶ b)
(g : b ⟶ c) (h : c ⟶ d) (i : d ⟶ e),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data g
        (functor_composite_data h i)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data f
        (functor_composite_data g h)) i)
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data f g) h) i)
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data f
        (functor_composite_data g
           (functor_composite_data h i)))
     (functor_composite_data f
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data g h) i))
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data f
           (functor_composite_data g h)) i)
     (pre_whisker f
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data g
              (functor_composite_data h i))))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data f
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data g h) i))))
  (post_whisker
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data f
           (functor_composite_data g h))) i) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data f
     (functor_composite_data g
        (functor_composite_data h i)))
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data f g)
     (functor_composite_data h i))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data f g) h) i)
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data f
        (functor_composite_data g
           (functor_composite_data h i))))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data f g)
        (functor_composite_data h i)))
 
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
F₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
F₄: C₄ ⟶ C₅
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data F₁
     (functor_composite_data F₂
        (functor_composite_data F₃ F₄)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data F₁
        (functor_composite_data F₂ F₃)) F₄)
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data F₁ F₂) F₃) F₄)
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data F₁
        (functor_composite_data F₂
           (functor_composite_data F₃ F₄)))
     (functor_composite_data F₁
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data F₂ F₃) F₄))
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data F₁
           (functor_composite_data F₂ F₃)) F₄)
     (pre_whisker F₁
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data F₂
              (functor_composite_data F₃ F₄))))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data F₁
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data F₂ F₃) F₄))))
  (post_whisker
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data F₁
           (functor_composite_data F₂ F₃))) F₄) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data F₁
     (functor_composite_data F₂
        (functor_composite_data F₃ F₄)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data F₁ F₂)
     (functor_composite_data F₃ F₄))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data F₁ F₂) F₃) F₄)
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data F₁
        (functor_composite_data F₂
           (functor_composite_data F₃ F₄))))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data F₁ F₂)
        (functor_composite_data F₃ F₄)))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
F₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
F₄: C₄ ⟶ C₅
∏ x : C₁,
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data F₁
     (functor_composite_data F₂
        (functor_composite_data F₃ F₄)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data F₁
        (functor_composite_data F₂ F₃)) F₄)
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data F₁ F₂) F₃) F₄)
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data F₁
        (functor_composite_data F₂
           (functor_composite_data F₃ F₄)))
     (functor_composite_data F₁
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data F₂ F₃) F₄))
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data F₁
           (functor_composite_data F₂ F₃)) F₄)
     (pre_whisker F₁
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data F₂
              (functor_composite_data F₃ F₄))))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data F₁
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data F₂ F₃) F₄))))
  (post_whisker
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data F₁
           (functor_composite_data F₂ F₃))) F₄) x =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data F₁
     (functor_composite_data F₂
        (functor_composite_data F₃ F₄)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data F₁ F₂)
     (functor_composite_data F₃ F₄))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data F₁ F₂) F₃) F₄)
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data F₁
        (functor_composite_data F₂
           (functor_composite_data F₃ F₄))))
  (nat_trans_id
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data F₁ F₂)
        (functor_composite_data F₃ F₄))) x

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
F₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
F₄: C₄ ⟶ C₅
x: C₁
id₁ (F₄ (F₃ (F₂ (pr1 F₁ x))))
· id₁ (F₄ (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))))
· # (pr1 F₄) (id₁ (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x)))) =
id₁ (F₄ (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x)))) · id₁ (F₄ (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))))

    
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄, C₅: univalent_category
F₁: C₁ ⟶ C₂
F₂: C₂ ⟶ C₃
F₃: C₃ ⟶ C₄
F₄: C₄ ⟶ C₅
x: C₁
# (pr1 F₄) (id₁ (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x)))) =
id₁ (F₄ (F₃ (F₂ (F₁ x))))

    exact (functor_id F₄ _).
Qed.

Definition prebicat_of_univ_cats : prebicat := _ ,, cat_prebicat_laws.


isaset_cells prebicat_of_univ_cats


isaset_cells prebicat_of_univ_cats

  
a, b: prebicat_of_univ_cats
f, g: prebicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
isaset (f ==> g)

  
a, b: prebicat_of_univ_cats
f, g: prebicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧
has_homsets b

  apply homset_property.
Qed.

Definition bicat_of_univ_cats : bicat
  := (prebicat_of_univ_cats,, isaset_cells_prebicat_of_univ_cats).


C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
η: F ==> G
is_invertible_2cell η → is_nat_z_iso (pr1 η)


C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
η: F ==> G
is_invertible_2cell η → is_nat_z_iso (pr1 η)

  
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
η: F ==> G
Hη: is_invertible_2cell η
X: C
is_z_isomorphism (pr1 η X)

F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧

Hη: is_invertible_2cell η
X: C
D ⟦ G X, F X ⟧
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
η: F ==> G
Hη: is_invertible_2cell η
X: C
(λ g : D ⟦ G X, F X ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat (pr1 η X) g) ?pr1

  
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
η: F ==> G
Hη: is_invertible_2cell η
X: C
D ⟦ G X, F X ⟧
 apply Hη^-1.
  
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
η: F ==> G
Hη: is_invertible_2cell η
X: C
(λ g : D ⟦ G X, F X ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat (pr1 η X) g)
  (let X0 := pr1 Hη ^-1 in X0 X)
 abstract
      (split ; cbn ;
       [ exact (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (vcomp_rinv Hη) X)
       | exact (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (vcomp_linv Hη) X)]).
Defined.

G ==> F

C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
η: F ==> G
Hη: is_nat_z_iso (pr1 η)
G ==> F
 apply (nat_z_iso_inv (η ,, Hη)).
  
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
η: F ==> G
Hη: is_nat_z_iso (pr1 η)
(λ φ : G ==> F, η • φ = id₂ F × φ • η = id₂ G)
  (let X := pr1 (nat_z_iso_inv (η,, Hη)) in X)
 abstract
      (split ;
       [ apply nat_trans_eq ; [ apply homset_property | ] ;
         intros x ; cbn ;
         exact (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (pr1 η x ,, _))
       | apply nat_trans_eq ; [ apply homset_property | ] ;
         intros x ; cbn ;
         exact (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (pr1 η x ,, _)) ]).
Defined.

A: left_adjoint_equivalence F
adj_equivalence_of_cats F

  
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: left_adjoint_equivalence F
D ⟶ C
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: left_adjoint_equivalence F
functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ ?G
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: left_adjoint_equivalence F
?G ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: left_adjoint_equivalence F
form_adjunction F ?G ?η ?ε
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: left_adjoint_equivalence F
forms_equivalence (F,, ?G,, ?η,, ?ε)

  
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: left_adjoint_equivalence F
D ⟶ C
 exact (left_adjoint_right_adjoint A).
  
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: left_adjoint_equivalence F
functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ left_adjoint_right_adjoint A
 exact (left_adjoint_unit A).
  
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: left_adjoint_equivalence F
left_adjoint_right_adjoint A ∙ F ⟹ functor_identity D
 exact (left_adjoint_counit A).
  
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: left_adjoint_equivalence F
form_adjunction F (left_adjoint_right_adjoint A)
  (left_adjoint_unit A) (left_adjoint_counit A)
 
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: left_adjoint_equivalence F
triangle_1_statement
  (F,,
   left_adjoint_right_adjoint A,,
   left_adjoint_unit A,, left_adjoint_counit A)
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: left_adjoint_equivalence F
triangle_2_statement
  (F,,
   left_adjoint_right_adjoint A,,
   left_adjoint_unit A,, left_adjoint_counit A)

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: left_adjoint_equivalence F
triangle_1_statement
  (F,,
   left_adjoint_right_adjoint A,,
   left_adjoint_unit A,, left_adjoint_counit A)
 abstract
        (intro x ;
         cbn ;
         pose (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (internal_triangle1 A) x) as p ;
         cbn in p ;
         rewrite !id_left, !id_right in p ;
         exact p).
    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: left_adjoint_equivalence F
triangle_2_statement
  (F,,
   left_adjoint_right_adjoint A,,
   left_adjoint_unit A,, left_adjoint_counit A)
 abstract
        (intro x ;
         cbn ;
         pose (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (internal_triangle2 A) x) as p ;
         cbn in p ;
         rewrite !id_left, !id_right in p ;
         exact p).
  
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: left_adjoint_equivalence F
forms_equivalence
  (F,,
   left_adjoint_right_adjoint A,,
   left_adjoint_unit A,, left_adjoint_counit A)
 
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: left_adjoint_equivalence F
∏ a : C,
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjunit
     (F,,
      left_adjoint_right_adjoint A,,
      left_adjoint_unit A,, left_adjoint_counit A) a)
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: left_adjoint_equivalence F
∏ b : D,
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjcounit
     (F,,
      left_adjoint_right_adjoint A,,
      left_adjoint_unit A,, left_adjoint_counit A) b)

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: left_adjoint_equivalence F
∏ a : C,
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjunit
     (F,,
      left_adjoint_right_adjoint A,,
      left_adjoint_unit A,, left_adjoint_counit A) a)
 
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: left_adjoint_equivalence F
X: C
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjunit
     (F,,
      left_adjoint_right_adjoint A,,
      left_adjoint_unit A,, left_adjoint_counit A) X)

      apply (invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso _ _ (left_equivalence_unit_iso A)).
    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: left_adjoint_equivalence F
∏ b : D,
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjcounit
     (F,,
      left_adjoint_right_adjoint A,,
      left_adjoint_unit A,, left_adjoint_counit A) b)
 
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: left_adjoint_equivalence F
X: D
is_z_isomorphism
  (adjcounit
     (F,,
      left_adjoint_right_adjoint A,,
      left_adjoint_unit A,, left_adjoint_counit A) X)

      apply (invertible_2cell_to_nat_z_iso _ _ (left_equivalence_counit_iso A)).
Defined.

F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
adj_equivalence_of_cats F → left_adjoint_equivalence F


C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats

left_adjoint_equivalence F

F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
left_adjoint_data F
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
(λ αd : left_adjoint_data F,
 left_adjoint_axioms αd × left_equivalence_axioms αd)
  ?pr1

  
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
left_adjoint_data F
 
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, C ⟧
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
(λ g : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, C ⟧,
 id₁ C ==> F · g × g · F ==> id₁ D) ?pr1

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, C ⟧
 apply A.
    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
(λ g : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ D, C ⟧,
 id₁ C ==> F · g × g · F ==> id₁ D)
  (let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0)
 
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
functor_identity_data C
⟹ functor_composite_data F (pr11 A)
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
functor_composite_data (pr11 A) F
⟹ functor_identity_data D

      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
functor_identity_data C
⟹ functor_composite_data F (pr11 A)
 exact (pr1 (pr121 A)).
      
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
functor_composite_data (pr11 A) F
⟹ functor_identity_data D
 exact (pr2 (pr121 A)).
  
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
(λ αd : left_adjoint_data F,
 left_adjoint_axioms αd × left_equivalence_axioms αd)
  ((let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
   (pr112 (pr1 A)
    :
    id₁ C ==>
    F · (let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0)),,
   (pr212 (pr1 A)
    :
    (let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0) · F ==>
    id₁ D))
 
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
(((linvunitor F
   • (left_adjoint_unit
        ((let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
         pr112 (pr1 A),, pr212 (pr1 A)) ▹ F))
  • rassociator F
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
         ((let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
          pr112 (pr1 A),, pr212 (pr1 A))) F)
 • (F
    ◃ left_adjoint_counit
        ((let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
         pr112 (pr1 A),, pr212 (pr1 A)))) • runitor F =
id₂ F
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
(((rinvunitor
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        ((let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
         pr112 (pr1 A),, pr212 (pr1 A)))
   • (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        ((let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
         pr112 (pr1 A),, pr212 (pr1 A))
      ◃ left_adjoint_unit
          ((let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
           pr112 (pr1 A),, pr212 (pr1 A))))
  • lassociator
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
         ((let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
          pr112 (pr1 A),, pr212 (pr1 A))) F
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
         ((let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
          pr112 (pr1 A),, pr212 (pr1 A))))
 • (left_adjoint_counit
      ((let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
       pr112 (pr1 A),, pr212 (pr1 A))
    ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        ((let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
         pr112 (pr1 A),, pr212 (pr1 A))))
• lunitor
    (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
       ((let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
        pr112 (pr1 A),, pr212 (pr1 A))) =
id₂
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
     ((let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
      pr112 (pr1 A),, pr212 (pr1 A)))
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_unit
     ((let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
      pr112 (pr1 A),, pr212 (pr1 A)))
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_counit
     ((let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
      pr112 (pr1 A),, pr212 (pr1 A)))

    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
(((linvunitor F
   • (left_adjoint_unit
        ((let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
         pr112 (pr1 A),, pr212 (pr1 A)) ▹ F))
  • rassociator F
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
         ((let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
          pr112 (pr1 A),, pr212 (pr1 A))) F)
 • (F
    ◃ left_adjoint_counit
        ((let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
         pr112 (pr1 A),, pr212 (pr1 A)))) • runitor F =
id₂ F
 abstract
        (apply nat_trans_eq ; [ apply homset_property | ] ;
         intro x ; cbn ;
         rewrite id_left, !id_right ;
         apply (pr2(pr2(pr1 A)))).
    
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
(((rinvunitor
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        ((let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
         pr112 (pr1 A),, pr212 (pr1 A)))
   • (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        ((let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
         pr112 (pr1 A),, pr212 (pr1 A))
      ◃ left_adjoint_unit
          ((let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
           pr112 (pr1 A),, pr212 (pr1 A))))
  • lassociator
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
         ((let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
          pr112 (pr1 A),, pr212 (pr1 A))) F
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
         ((let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
          pr112 (pr1 A),, pr212 (pr1 A))))
 • (left_adjoint_counit
      ((let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
       pr112 (pr1 A),, pr212 (pr1 A))
    ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        ((let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
         pr112 (pr1 A),, pr212 (pr1 A))))
• lunitor
    (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
       ((let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
        pr112 (pr1 A),, pr212 (pr1 A))) =
id₂
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
     ((let X := pr1 A in let X0 := pr1 X in X0),,
      pr112 (pr1 A),, pr212 (pr1 A)))
 abstract
        (apply nat_trans_eq ; [ apply homset_property | ] ;
         intro x ; cbn ;
         rewrite id_left, !id_right ;
         apply (pr2(pr2(pr1 A)))).

  (left_adjoint_unit

   left_adjoint_axioms x × left_equivalence_axioms x)

C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: left_adjoint_equivalence F
x: left_adjoint_data F
isaprop
  ((((linvunitor F • (left_adjoint_unit x ▹ F))
     • rassociator F (left_adjoint_right_adjoint x) F)
    • (F ◃ left_adjoint_counit x)) • runitor F = id₂ F)
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: left_adjoint_equivalence F
x: left_adjoint_data F
isaprop
  ((((rinvunitor (left_adjoint_right_adjoint x)
      • (left_adjoint_right_adjoint x
         ◃ left_adjoint_unit x))
     • lassociator (left_adjoint_right_adjoint x) F
         (left_adjoint_right_adjoint x))
    • (left_adjoint_counit x
       ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint x))
   • lunitor (left_adjoint_right_adjoint x) =
   id₂ (left_adjoint_right_adjoint x))

  ((((linvunitor F • (left_adjoint_unit x ▹ F))
     • rassociator F (left_adjoint_right_adjoint x) F)
    • (F ◃ left_adjoint_counit x)) • runitor F = id₂ F)
 apply cellset_property.

C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
isPredicate
  (λ x : functor_identity C
         ⟹ F
           ∙ pr11 (adj_equiv_to_equiv_cat F
                     (equiv_cat_to_adj_equiv F A))
         × pr11 (adj_equiv_to_equiv_cat F
                   (equiv_cat_to_adj_equiv F A)) ∙ F
           ⟹ functor_identity D,
   form_adjunction F
     (pr11 (adj_equiv_to_equiv_cat F
              (equiv_cat_to_adj_equiv F A))) (pr1 x)
     (pr2 x))

pr121 (adj_equiv_to_equiv_cat F
         (equiv_cat_to_adj_equiv F A)) =
pr1
  (transportb (are_adjoints F) (idpath (pr11 A))
     (pr21 A))

A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
isPredicate
  (λ x : functor_identity C
         ⟹ F
           ∙ pr11 (adj_equiv_to_equiv_cat F
                     (equiv_cat_to_adj_equiv F A))
         × pr11 (adj_equiv_to_equiv_cat F
                   (equiv_cat_to_adj_equiv F A)) ∙ F
           ⟹ functor_identity D,
   form_adjunction F
     (pr11 (adj_equiv_to_equiv_cat F
              (equiv_cat_to_adj_equiv F A))) (pr1 x)
     (pr2 x))
 
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
x: functor_identity C
⟹ F
  ∙ pr11 (adj_equiv_to_equiv_cat F
            (equiv_cat_to_adj_equiv F A))
× pr11 (adj_equiv_to_equiv_cat F
          (equiv_cat_to_adj_equiv F A)) ∙ F
  ⟹ functor_identity D
isaprop (form_adjunction F (pr11 A) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))

               apply (@isaprop_form_adjunction (pr1 C) (pr1 D)).
           
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
pr121 (adj_equiv_to_equiv_cat F
         (equiv_cat_to_adj_equiv F A)) =
pr1
  (transportb (are_adjoints F) (idpath (pr11 A))
     (pr21 A))
 apply idpath.
Defined.


C, D: univalent_category
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
F = G ≃ invertible_2cell F G


C, D: univalent_category
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
F = G ≃ invertible_2cell F G

  
C, D: univalent_category
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
isweq idtoiso

  
C, D: univalent_category
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
is_univalent D

  apply D.
Defined.


C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
p: F = G
x: pr1 C₁
(pr11 (idtoiso_2_1 F G p)) x =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ H : ∑ F : functor_data C₁ C₂, is_functor F,
      (pr11 H) x) p)


C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
p: F = G
x: pr1 C₁
(pr11 (idtoiso_2_1 F G p)) x =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ H : ∑ F : functor_data C₁ C₂, is_functor F,
      (pr11 H) x) p)

  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
x: pr1 C₁
id₁ (F x) = id₁ ((pr11 F) x)

  apply idpath.
Qed.

f = g ≃ invertible_2cell f g

f = g ≃ invertible_2cell f g

p: f = g

x: f ==> f

      apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell.

has_homsets D

f: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
∏ x : C,
pr1 (univalent_cat_idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)) x =
pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)) x

f: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
has_homsets D
 apply homset_property. 
C, D: bicat_of_univ_cats
f: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C, D ⟧
∏ x : C,
pr1 (univalent_cat_idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)) x =
pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)) x

C = D ≃ pr1 C = pr1 D

C, D: category
isaprop (has_homsets (pr1 D))

  apply isaprop_has_homsets.
Defined.

Section CatIso_To_LeftAdjEquiv.
  Context {C D : univalent_category}.
  Variable (F : C ⟶ D)
           (HF : is_catiso F).

  
C, D: univalent_category
F: C ⟶ D
HF: is_catiso F
nat_z_iso (functor_identity C)
  (F ∙ inv_catiso (F,, HF))

  
C, D: univalent_category
F: C ⟶ D
HF: is_catiso F
nat_z_iso (functor_identity C)
  (F ∙ inv_catiso (F,, HF))

    
C, D: univalent_category
F: C ⟶ D
HF: is_catiso F
functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ inv_catiso (F,, HF)
C, D: univalent_category
F: C ⟶ D
HF: is_catiso F
(λ μ : functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ inv_catiso (F,, HF),
 is_nat_z_iso μ) ?pr1

    
C, D: univalent_category
F: C ⟶ D
HF: is_catiso F
functor_identity C ⟹ F ∙ inv_catiso (F,, HF)
 
C, D: univalent_category
F: C ⟶ D
HF: is_catiso F
nat_trans_data (functor_identity C)
  (F ∙ inv_catiso (F,, HF))
C, D: univalent_category
F: C ⟶ D
HF: is_catiso F
is_nat_trans (functor_identity C)
  (F ∙ inv_catiso (F,, HF)) ?t

      
C, D: univalent_category
F: C ⟶ D
HF: is_catiso F
nat_trans_data (functor_identity C)
  (F ∙ inv_catiso (F,, HF))
 
C, D: univalent_category
F: C ⟶ D
HF: is_catiso F
X: C
C ⟦ X, invmap (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF)) (F X) ⟧

        exact (pr1 (idtoiso (! homotinvweqweq (catiso_ob_weq (F ,, HF)) X))).
      
C, D: univalent_category
F: C ⟶ D
HF: is_catiso F
is_nat_trans (functor_identity C)
  (F ∙ inv_catiso (F,, HF))
  ((λ X : C,
    pr1
      (idtoiso
         (! homotinvweqweq (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF)) X))
    :
    C ⟦ functor_identity C X,
    (F ∙ inv_catiso (F,, HF)) X ⟧)
   :
   nat_trans_data (functor_identity C)
     (F ∙ inv_catiso (F,, HF)))
 
C, D: univalent_category
F: C ⟶ D
HF: is_catiso F
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
f
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (! homotinvweqweq (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF)) Y)) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (! homotinvweqweq (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF)) X))
· invmap
    (catiso_fully_faithful_weq (F,, HF)
       (invmap (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF)) (F X))
       (invmap (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF)) (F Y)))
    (idtoiso
       (homotweqinvweq (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF)) (F X))
     · # F f
     · idtoiso
         (! homotweqinvweq (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF))
              (F Y)))

        
C, D: univalent_category
F: C ⟶ D
HF: is_catiso F
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(λ f : C ⟦ X, invmap (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF)) (F Y) ⟧
       → D ⟦ F X,
         F (invmap (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF)) (F Y)) ⟧,
 isweq f) # F
C, D: univalent_category
F: C ⟶ D
HF: is_catiso F
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(# F,, ?pr20)
  (f
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (! homotinvweqweq (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF)) Y))) =
(# F,, ?pr20)
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (! homotinvweqweq (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF)) X))
   · invmap
       (catiso_fully_faithful_weq (F,, HF)
          (invmap (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF)) (F X))
          (invmap (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF)) (F Y)))
       (idtoiso
          (homotweqinvweq (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF))
             (F X)) · # F f
        · idtoiso
            (! homotweqinvweq (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF))
                 (F Y))))

        
C, D: univalent_category
F: C ⟶ D
HF: is_catiso F
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(λ f : C ⟦ X, invmap (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF)) (F Y) ⟧
       → D ⟦ F X,
         F (invmap (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF)) (F Y)) ⟧,
 isweq f) # F
 apply HF. 
C, D: univalent_category
F: C ⟶ D
HF: is_catiso F
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
(# F,,
 (let X0 := pr1 HF in
  X0 X (invmap (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF)) (F Y))))
  (f
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (! homotinvweqweq (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF)) Y))) =
(# F,,
 (let X0 := pr1 HF in
  X0 X (invmap (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF)) (F Y))))
  (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (! homotinvweqweq (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF)) X))
   · invmap
       (catiso_fully_faithful_weq (F,, HF)
          (invmap (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF)) (F X))
          (invmap (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF)) (F Y)))
       (idtoiso
          (homotweqinvweq (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF))
             (F X)) · # F f
        · idtoiso
            (! homotweqinvweq (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF))
                 (F Y))))

F: C ⟶ D
HF: is_catiso F
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧

  (invmap
     (catiso_fully_faithful_weq (F,, HF)
        (invmap (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF)) (F X))

      · # F f
      · idtoiso
          (! homotweqinvweq (catiso_ob_weq (F,, HF))
               (F Y)))) = ?t2

          match goal with [ |- _ (invmap ?FFF ?fff) = _ ] => apply (homotweqinvweq FFF fff) end.
