F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
(λ _ : id₁ C₁ ==> F · ?pr1, ?pr1 · F ==> id₁ C₂) ?pr10
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_unit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2))
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
(λ _ : is_invertible_2cell
         (left_adjoint_unit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2)),
 is_invertible_2cell
   (left_adjoint_counit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2))) ?pr11

  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₂, C₁ ⟧
 exact (adj_equivalence_inv A).
  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
id₁ C₁ ==> F · adj_equivalence_inv A
 exact (pr1 (unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats A)).
  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
(λ _ : id₁ C₁ ==> F · adj_equivalence_inv A,
 adj_equivalence_inv A · F ==> id₁ C₂)
  (pr1 (unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats A))
 exact (pr1 (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats A)).
  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_unit
     (adj_equivalence_inv A,,
      pr1
        (unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats A),,
      pr1
        (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
           A)))
 
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
is_nat_z_iso
  (pr1
     (left_adjoint_unit
        (adj_equivalence_inv A,,
         pr1
           (unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
              A),,
         pr1
           (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
              A))))

    exact (pr2 (unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats A)).
  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
(λ _ : is_invertible_2cell
         (left_adjoint_unit
            (adj_equivalence_inv A,,
             pr1
               (unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
                  A),,
             pr1
               (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
                  A))),
 is_invertible_2cell
   (left_adjoint_counit
      (adj_equivalence_inv A,,
       pr1
         (unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
            A),,
       pr1
         (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
            A))))
  (is_nat_z_iso_to_is_invertible_2cell
     (left_adjoint_unit
        (adj_equivalence_inv A,,
         pr1
           (unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
              A),,
         pr1
           (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
              A)))
     (pr2
        (unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats A)))
 
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
A: adj_equivalence_of_cats F
is_nat_z_iso
  (pr1
     (left_adjoint_counit
        (adj_equivalence_inv A,,
         pr1
           (unit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
              A),,
         pr1
           (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats
              A))))

    exact (pr2 (counit_nat_z_iso_from_adj_equivalence_of_cats A)).
Defined.

(** Left adjoints and right adjoints of categories *)

C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
L: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HL: left_adjoint L
is_left_adjoint L


C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
L: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HL: left_adjoint L
is_left_adjoint L

  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
L: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HL: left_adjoint L
(λ etaeps : functor_identity C₁
            ⟹ L ∙ left_adjoint_right_adjoint HL
            × left_adjoint_right_adjoint HL ∙ L
              ⟹ functor_identity C₂,
 form_adjunction L (left_adjoint_right_adjoint HL)
   (pr1 etaeps) (pr2 etaeps))
  (left_adjoint_unit HL,, left_adjoint_counit HL)

  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
L: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HL: left_adjoint L
triangle_1_statement
  (L,,
   left_adjoint_right_adjoint HL,,
   pr1 (left_adjoint_unit HL,, left_adjoint_counit HL),,
   pr2 (left_adjoint_unit HL,, left_adjoint_counit HL))
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
L: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HL: left_adjoint L
triangle_2_statement
  (L,,
   left_adjoint_right_adjoint HL,,
   pr1 (left_adjoint_unit HL,, left_adjoint_counit HL),,
   pr2 (left_adjoint_unit HL,, left_adjoint_counit HL))

  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
L: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HL: left_adjoint L
triangle_1_statement
  (L,,
   left_adjoint_right_adjoint HL,,
   pr1 (left_adjoint_unit HL,, left_adjoint_counit HL),,
   pr2 (left_adjoint_unit HL,, left_adjoint_counit HL))
 abstract
      (intro x ; cbn ;
       pose (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (internal_triangle1 HL) x) as p ;
       cbn in p ;
       rewrite !id_left, !id_right in p ;
       exact p).
  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
L: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HL: left_adjoint L
triangle_2_statement
  (L,,
   left_adjoint_right_adjoint HL,,
   pr1 (left_adjoint_unit HL,, left_adjoint_counit HL),,
   pr2 (left_adjoint_unit HL,, left_adjoint_counit HL))
 abstract
      (intro x ; cbn ;
       pose (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (internal_triangle2 HL) x) as p ;
       cbn in p ;
       rewrite !id_left, !id_right in p ;
       exact p).
Defined.


C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
L: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HL: is_left_adjoint L
left_adjoint L


C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
L: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HL: is_left_adjoint L
left_adjoint L

  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
L: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HL: is_left_adjoint L
(λ αd : left_adjoint_data L, left_adjoint_axioms αd)
  (right_functor HL,, adjunit HL,, adjcounit HL)

  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
L: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HL: is_left_adjoint L
(((linvunitor L
   • (left_adjoint_unit
        (right_functor HL,, adjunit HL,, adjcounit HL)
      ▹ L))
  • rassociator L
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
         (right_functor HL,, adjunit HL,, adjcounit HL))
      L)
 • (L
    ◃ left_adjoint_counit
        (right_functor HL,, adjunit HL,, adjcounit HL)))
• runitor L = id₂ L
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
L: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HL: is_left_adjoint L
(((rinvunitor
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (right_functor HL,, adjunit HL,, adjcounit HL))
   • (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (right_functor HL,, adjunit HL,, adjcounit HL)
      ◃ left_adjoint_unit
          (right_functor HL,,
           adjunit HL,, adjcounit HL)))
  • lassociator
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
         (right_functor HL,, adjunit HL,, adjcounit HL))
      L
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
         (right_functor HL,, adjunit HL,, adjcounit HL)))
 • (left_adjoint_counit
      (right_functor HL,, adjunit HL,, adjcounit HL)
    ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (right_functor HL,, adjunit HL,, adjcounit HL)))
• lunitor
    (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
       (right_functor HL,, adjunit HL,, adjcounit HL)) =
id₂
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
     (right_functor HL,, adjunit HL,, adjcounit HL))

  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
L: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HL: is_left_adjoint L
(((linvunitor L
   • (left_adjoint_unit
        (right_functor HL,, adjunit HL,, adjcounit HL)
      ▹ L))
  • rassociator L
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
         (right_functor HL,, adjunit HL,, adjcounit HL))
      L)
 • (L
    ◃ left_adjoint_counit
        (right_functor HL,, adjunit HL,, adjcounit HL)))
• runitor L = id₂ L
 abstract
      (use nat_trans_eq ; [ apply homset_property | ] ;
       intro x ; cbn ;
       rewrite !id_left, !id_right ;
       apply (pr122 HL)).
  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
L: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
HL: is_left_adjoint L
(((rinvunitor
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (right_functor HL,, adjunit HL,, adjcounit HL))
   • (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (right_functor HL,, adjunit HL,, adjcounit HL)
      ◃ left_adjoint_unit
          (right_functor HL,,
           adjunit HL,, adjcounit HL)))
  • lassociator
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
         (right_functor HL,, adjunit HL,, adjcounit HL))
      L
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
         (right_functor HL,, adjunit HL,, adjcounit HL)))
 • (left_adjoint_counit
      (right_functor HL,, adjunit HL,, adjcounit HL)
    ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (right_functor HL,, adjunit HL,, adjcounit HL)))
• lunitor
    (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
       (right_functor HL,, adjunit HL,, adjcounit HL)) =
id₂
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
     (right_functor HL,, adjunit HL,, adjcounit HL))
 abstract
      (use nat_trans_eq ; [ apply homset_property | ] ;
       intro x ; cbn ;
       rewrite !id_left, !id_right ;
       apply (pr222 HL)).
Defined.

 exact left_adjoint_to_is_left_adjoint.

L: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧

?g (left_adjoint_to_is_left_adjoint x) = x

L: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
∏ y : is_left_adjoint L,
left_adjoint_to_is_left_adjoint (?g y) = y

    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
L: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
is_left_adjoint L → left_adjoint L
 exact is_left_adjoint_to_left_adjoint.
    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
L: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
∏ x : left_adjoint L,
is_left_adjoint_to_left_adjoint
  (left_adjoint_to_is_left_adjoint x) = x
 abstract
        (intro HL ;
         use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isapropdirprod ; apply cellset_property | ] ;
         apply idpath).
    
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
L: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
∏ y : is_left_adjoint L,
left_adjoint_to_is_left_adjoint
  (is_left_adjoint_to_left_adjoint y) = y
 abstract
        (intro HL ;
         refine (maponpaths (λ z, _ ,, z) _) ;
         use subtypePath ; [ | apply idpath ] ;
         intro ;
         apply isapropdirprod ; use impred ; intro ; apply homset_property).
Defined.

  (pr121 HR,, pr221 HR)

(**
   This gives us a bicategorical proof that being a left adjooint is a proposition
 *)

C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (is_left_adjoint F)


C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (is_left_adjoint F)

  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isofhlevel 1 (left_adjoint F)

  
C₁, C₂: univalent_category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
is_univalent_2_1 bicat_of_univ_cats

  exact univalent_cat_is_univalent_2_1.
Qed.

(**
   With univalence we also get simple proofs that left adjoints are preserved under adjoint
   equivalence in the arrow bicategory
 *)

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₃, C₄ ⟧
E: adjoint_equivalence C₁ C₃
E': adjoint_equivalence C₂ C₄
τ: invertible_2cell (E · G) (F · E')
HF: is_left_adjoint F
is_left_adjoint G


C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₃, C₄ ⟧
E: adjoint_equivalence C₁ C₃
E': adjoint_equivalence C₂ C₄
τ: invertible_2cell (E · G) (F · E')
HF: is_left_adjoint F
is_left_adjoint G

  
∏ (C₁ C₃ : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(E : adjoint_equivalence C₁ C₃)
(C₂ C₄ : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(E' : adjoint_equivalence C₂ C₄)
(F : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧)
(G : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₃, C₄ ⟧),
invertible_2cell (E · G) (F · E')
→ is_left_adjoint F → is_left_adjoint G

  
is_univalent_2_0 bicat_of_univ_cats
∏ a : bicat_of_univ_cats,
(λ (a0 b : bicat_of_univ_cats)
 (f : adjoint_equivalence a0 b),
 ∏ (C₂ C₄ : bicat_of_univ_cats)
 (E' : adjoint_equivalence C₂ C₄)
 (F : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a0, C₂ ⟧)
 (G : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ b, C₄ ⟧),
 invertible_2cell (f · G) (F · E')
 → is_left_adjoint F → is_left_adjoint G) a a
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a)

  
is_univalent_2_0 bicat_of_univ_cats

    exact univalent_cat_is_univalent_2_0.
  
∏ a : bicat_of_univ_cats,
(λ (a0 b : bicat_of_univ_cats)
 (f : adjoint_equivalence a0 b),
 ∏ (C₂ C₄ : bicat_of_univ_cats)
 (E' : adjoint_equivalence C₂ C₄)
 (F : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a0, C₂ ⟧)
 (G : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ b, C₄ ⟧),
 invertible_2cell (f · G) (F · E')
 → is_left_adjoint F → is_left_adjoint G) a a
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a)

  
C₁: bicat_of_univ_cats
(λ (a b : bicat_of_univ_cats)
 (f : adjoint_equivalence a b),
 ∏ (C₂ C₄ : bicat_of_univ_cats)
 (E' : adjoint_equivalence C₂ C₄)
 (F : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, C₂ ⟧)
 (G : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ b, C₄ ⟧),
 invertible_2cell (f · G) (F · E')
 → is_left_adjoint F → is_left_adjoint G) C₁ C₁
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C₁)

  
C₁: bicat_of_univ_cats
is_univalent_2_0 bicat_of_univ_cats
C₁: bicat_of_univ_cats
∏ a : bicat_of_univ_cats,
(λ (a0 b : bicat_of_univ_cats)
 (f : adjoint_equivalence a0 b),
 ∏ (F : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, a0 ⟧)
 (G : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, b ⟧),
 invertible_2cell
   (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C₁ · G)
   (F · f) → is_left_adjoint F → is_left_adjoint G) a
  a (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a)

  
C₁: bicat_of_univ_cats
is_univalent_2_0 bicat_of_univ_cats

    exact univalent_cat_is_univalent_2_0.
  
C₁: bicat_of_univ_cats
∏ a : bicat_of_univ_cats,
(λ (a0 b : bicat_of_univ_cats)
 (f : adjoint_equivalence a0 b),
 ∏ (F : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, a0 ⟧)
 (G : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, b ⟧),
 invertible_2cell
   (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C₁ · G)
   (F · f) → is_left_adjoint F → is_left_adjoint G) a
  a (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a)

  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
(λ (a b : bicat_of_univ_cats)
 (f : adjoint_equivalence a b),
 ∏ (F : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, a ⟧)
 (G : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, b ⟧),
 invertible_2cell
   (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C₁ · G)
   (F · f) → is_left_adjoint F → is_left_adjoint G) C₂
  C₂ (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C₂)

  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C₁ · G)
  (F · internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C₂)
is_left_adjoint F → is_left_adjoint G

  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C₁ · G)
  (F · internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C₂)
invertible_2cell F G
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C₁ · G)
  (F · internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C₂)
τ': invertible_2cell F G
is_left_adjoint F → is_left_adjoint G

  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C₁ · G)
  (F · internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C₂)
invertible_2cell F G

    exact (comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell _)
             (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                (inv_of_invertible_2cell τ)
                (linvunitor_invertible_2cell _))).
  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C₁ · G)
  (F · internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity C₂)
τ': invertible_2cell F G
is_left_adjoint F → is_left_adjoint G

  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F, G: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
τ': invertible_2cell F G
is_left_adjoint F → is_left_adjoint G

  
∏ (C₁ C₂ : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(F G : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧),
invertible_2cell F G
→ is_left_adjoint F → is_left_adjoint G

  
is_univalent_2_1 bicat_of_univ_cats
∏ (a b : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧),
(λ (a0 b0 : bicat_of_univ_cats)
 (f0 g : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧)
 (_ : invertible_2cell f0 g),
 is_left_adjoint f0 → is_left_adjoint g) a b f f
  (id2_invertible_2cell f)

  
is_univalent_2_1 bicat_of_univ_cats

    exact univalent_cat_is_univalent_2_1.
  
∏ (a b : bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧),
(λ (a0 b0 : bicat_of_univ_cats)
 (f0 g : bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧)
 (_ : invertible_2cell f0 g),
 is_left_adjoint f0 → is_left_adjoint g) a b f f
  (id2_invertible_2cell f)

  
C₁, C₂: bicat_of_univ_cats
F: bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧
H: is_left_adjoint F
is_left_adjoint F

  exact H.
Qed.


C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
HC₁: is_univalent C₁
HC₂: is_univalent C₂
HC₃: is_univalent C₃
HC₄: is_univalent C₄
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
E: C₁ ⟶ C₃
E': C₂ ⟶ C₄
τ: nat_z_iso (E ∙ G) (F ∙ E')
HE: adj_equivalence_of_cats E
HE': adj_equivalence_of_cats E'
HF: is_left_adjoint F
is_left_adjoint G

HF: is_left_adjoint F

 exact F.

E': C₂ ⟶ C₄
τ: nat_z_iso (E ∙ G) (F ∙ E')

adj_equivalence_of_cats E'

    exact HE'.
  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
HC₁: is_univalent C₁
HC₂: is_univalent C₂
HC₃: is_univalent C₃
HC₄: is_univalent C₄
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
E: C₁ ⟶ C₃
E': C₂ ⟶ C₄
τ: nat_z_iso (E ∙ G) (F ∙ E')
HE: adj_equivalence_of_cats E
HE': adj_equivalence_of_cats E'
HF: is_left_adjoint F
invertible_2cell
  ((E,, equiv_cat_to_adj_equiv E HE) · G)
  (F · (E',, equiv_cat_to_adj_equiv E' HE'))
 
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
HC₁: is_univalent C₁
HC₂: is_univalent C₂
HC₃: is_univalent C₃
HC₄: is_univalent C₄
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
E: C₁ ⟶ C₃
E': C₂ ⟶ C₄
τ: nat_z_iso (E ∙ G) (F ∙ E')
HE: adj_equivalence_of_cats E
HE': adj_equivalence_of_cats E'
HF: is_left_adjoint F
nat_z_iso ((E,, equiv_cat_to_adj_equiv E HE) · G)
  (F · (E',, equiv_cat_to_adj_equiv E' HE'))

    exact τ.
  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
HC₁: is_univalent C₁
HC₂: is_univalent C₂
HC₃: is_univalent C₃
HC₄: is_univalent C₄
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₃ ⟶ C₄
E: C₁ ⟶ C₃
E': C₂ ⟶ C₄
τ: nat_z_iso (E ∙ G) (F ∙ E')
HE: adj_equivalence_of_cats E
HE': adj_equivalence_of_cats E'
HF: is_left_adjoint F
is_left_adjoint F
 exact HF.
Qed.
